# openrouter_models (Data Source)

Lists OpenRouter model metadata.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "openrouter_models" "programming" {
  category = "programming"
}

output "model_ids" {
  value = [for model in data.openrouter_models.programming.models : model.id]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `category` (String) Optional OpenRouter model category filter, such as `programming`.

### Read-Only

- `models` (Attributes List) OpenRouter models. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--models))

<a id="nestedatt--models"></a>
### Nested Schema for `models`

Read-Only:

- `canonical_slug` (String)
- `context_length` (Number)
- `created` (Number)
- `default_parameters_json` (String)
- `description` (String)
- `hugging_face_id` (String)
- `id` (String)
- `input_modalities` (List of String)
- `instruct_type` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `output_modalities` (List of String)
- `per_request_limits_json` (String)
- `pricing_completion` (String)
- `pricing_image` (String)
- `pricing_input_cache_read` (String)
- `pricing_input_cache_write` (String)
- `pricing_internal_reasoning` (String)
- `pricing_prompt` (String)
- `pricing_request` (String)
- `pricing_web_search` (String)
- `supported_parameters` (List of String)
- `tokenizer` (String)
- `top_provider_context_length` (Number)
- `top_provider_is_moderated` (Boolean)
- `top_provider_max_completion_tokens` (Number)
